description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci build that runs on push to master and pull requests to master. The workflow should have three jobs: ubuntu-cmake, fedora-cmake, and freebsd-cmake, each running on ubuntu-latest. The ubuntu-cmake job should install dependencies, checkout code, and run make commands with KAFKA=y. The fedora-cmake job should run in a fedora:latest container, install dependencies, checkout code, and run make commands with KAFKA=y. The freebsd-cmake job should use a FreeBSD VM, install dependencies, and run gmake commands with KAFKA=y.
